THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALADEZ, RICARDO VALADEZ, MONICA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VADO, MARIA FLORES, CLAUDIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 410 MUNICH ST. SF, CA 94112, PLAINTIFFS TO RECOVER POSSESION OF THE PREMISES. DEFENDANTS SHALL SURRENDER THE KEYS TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL NO LATER THAN 6PM ON JULY 6, 2009. FAILURE TO DO SO, PLAINTIFFS, SHALL BE ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT BY EX-PARTE MOTION FOR ALL RENTAL ARREARS OF $11,425.00 AND DAILY DAMAGES OF $58.25 AND ATTORNEYS FEES. (SEE SCANNED DOC)
